text:
Created attachment 148270
( v2 )

> Is there a way to get the SONAME rather than a file path? I.e, "try linking -lelf"

Yes, but it's somewhat ugly. I spent many minutes looking for a routine in bfd to do strip "lib<foo>.so<.bar>" for me, but didn't find anything. Anyway, here's v2.

Now the message is:
/usr/bin/ld: undefined reference to symbol `elf32_fsize@@R1.0' (try adding -lelf)
